title: mcph CLI configuration (.mcph.json)
description: Configuration file for the @yawlabs/mcph CLI, which manages MCP servers via the mcp.hosting registry. Resolved in precedence order (most-specific to least-specific): <cwd>/.mcph.local.json  >  <cwd>/.mcph.json  >  ~/.mcph.json. Environment variables MCPH_TOKEN and MCPH_URL override file values. JSONC (comments) is permitted.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this JSON Schema, enabling IDE autocomplete in editors that honor $schema.

version.description: Config schema version. Current version: 1. A value newer than the CLI understands triggers a warning but is not fatal.

token.description: Personal access token for mcp.hosting. SECURITY: must NOT appear in a committed project-scope .mcph.json. Only valid in ~/.mcph.json (user-global) or .mcph.local.json (machine-local, gitignored). The MCPH_TOKEN environment variable overrides this value.

apiBase.description: Base URL of the mcp.hosting API. Default: https://mcp.hosting. The MCPH_URL environment variable overrides this value.

servers.description: Allow-list of server namespaces to activate. If set in any scope, only these servers are active. Precedence: project scope wins over local-project, which wins over global.

blocked.description: Deny-list of server namespaces that are never activated. Merged as a union across all scopes (additive, not overriding).
